general_advisory: In case of rain received, go for summer cultivation. The mechanized cultivation will invert the soil and pests and pathogens will be exposed to the sun and get killed. Go for drip irrigation system in orchards which saves water and saves from heat. Sprinkling irrigation method of irrigation reduces the effect of high temperature. Farmers are advised to avoid exposure outside during the peak heat hours of the day.

advisory: Prepare a well-cultivated dry bed for paddy transplantation. Mix FYM in the bed and sow seeds in lines.
Harvest the crop at maturity stage.
Choose good varieties like Arjuna, Kalua, Sriprava. Prepare the land and sow the ragi seeds.
Choose good varieties like Klinga Maize, Prabal. Apply basal dose of NPK after land preparation.
Collect good quality ginger Rhizomes like Suprava, Suruchi. Treat seeds before planting in the field.
Sow good varieties like Roma, Suroma, Ranga, Rashmi. Seed rate is 8-10 q/ac.
Seed rate is 8-10 q/ac. Plant in well-pulverized soil and make pits filled with FYM and topsoil.
Due to temperature effects, manage pests like Foot & Shoot borer in brinjal. Use Neem-based pesticides.
